justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the override, not the class extension). It also introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports in DAO files and changing session.invalidate() to request.logout() which might not be equivalent. The migration to commons-email2-jakarta is correct but the diff lacks Java 21 idioms.
